zh.Shelton, Norfolk, , England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Shelton, Esq.於1403年7月7日出生在英國諾福爾可雪登時，他的父親Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton30歲，母親Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness18歲。他於1429年與Margaret Brewse在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1431年4月23日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登享年27歲。

zh-hans.Shelton, Norfolk, , England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Shelton, Esq.于1403年7月7日出生在英国諾福爾可雪登时，他的父亲Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton30岁，母亲Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness18岁。他于1429年与Margaret Brewse在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1431年4月23日在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shelton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Shelton, Esq. was born on 7 July 1403, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton, was 30 and his mother, Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness, was 18. He married Margaret Brewse in 1429, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 23 April 1431, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Shelton, Esq. est né le 7 juillet 1403, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Brewse en 1429, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1431, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Shelton, Esq. am 7. Juli 1403 in Shelton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton 30 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness 18. Er hat 1429 in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Brewse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 23. April 1431 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Shelton, Esq. è nato il il 7 luglio 1403 nel Shelton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Brewse nel 1429, nel Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 23 aprile 1431, nel Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.Shelton, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクシェルトン
ja.Shelton, Norfolkshire, England: イギリスノーフォルクシェルトン
ja.lifeSummary: John Shelton, Esq.が1403年7月7日にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Sheltonは30歳，母Lady Catherine Barrett Baronessは18歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンでMargaret Brewseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1431年4月23日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Shelton, Esq.(이)가 1403년 7월 7일 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에서 Margaret Brewse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1431년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Shelton, Norfolk, , England: Shelton, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.7 July 1403–23 April 1431: 7 de julho de 1403–23 de abril de 1431
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Shelton, Esq. nasceu em 7 de julho de 1403, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Brewse em 1429, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1431, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Shelton, Esq. родился 7 июля 1403 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Brewse в 1429 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 23 апреля 1431 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.

es.7 July 1403–23 April 1431: 7 de julio de 1403–23 de abril de 1431
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Shelton, Esq. nació el 7 de julio de 1403, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Brewse en 1429, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 23 de abril de 1431, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años.
